headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Xcel Energy, Lowers Price Target to $91
summary: Mizuho  analyst Anthony Crowdell   maintains Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $94 to $91.
